requirement_topic.en: Refrigerant — R-600a Flammable Refrigerant Handling (EAEU TR CU 004/2011 + GOST IEC 60335-2-24, Kigali / Montreal Protocol)
requirement_topic.zh: 制冷剂——R-600a可燃制冷剂处理（EAEU TR CU 004/2011 + GOST IEC 60335-2-24，基加利／蒙特利尔议定书）
requirement_topic.zht: 製冷劑——R-600a可燃製冷劑處理（EAEU TR CU 004/2011 + GOST IEC 60335-2-24，基加利／蒙特利爾議定書）

summary.en: Household refrigerators marketed in Kazakhstan have overwhelmingly transitioned to R-600a (isobutane, GWP ≈ 3), a hydrocarbon refrigerant of low GWP. There is no single EAEU F-Gas phase-down regulation directly analogous to the EU F-Gas Regulation; instead, flammable refrigerant safety is enforced at appliance level through the safety regulation TR CU 004/2011 and the harmonised standard GOST IEC 60335-2-24, while the broader HFC phase-down is managed under the Kigali Amendment to the Montreal Protocol, to which Kazakhstan is a party (administered through national environmental authorities). For R-600a appliances manufacturers must: (1) verify that the refrigerant charge complies with the flammable-refrigerant provisions of GOST IEC 60335-2-24 （maximum R-600a charge per compartment configuration, ventilation and ignition-source requirements）; (2) declare the refrigerant designation （R-600a / isobutane） and charge quantity in grams in the product documentation, rating plate, and user instructions in Russian; (3) where any model still uses an HFC （e.g. R-134a, GWP 1430）, confirm import / placement is consistent with Kazakhstan's Montreal Protocol obligations and any EAEU restrictions in force. Routine service of R-600a domestic appliances does not trigger special refrigerant-handling certification because the charge is far below any tonne-CO2-equivalent threshold.
summary.zh: 在哈萨克斯坦销售的家用电冰箱已大量转向使用R-600a（异丁烷，全球变暖潜能值约3），一种低GWP的碳氢化合物制冷剂。EAEU没有单一的、与欧盟氟气体法规直接对应的氟气体削减法规；相反，可燃制冷剂安全在器具层面通过安全法规TR CU 004/2011及协调标准GOST IEC 60335-2-24执行，而更广泛的HFC削减则依据《蒙特利尔议定书基加利修正案》管理，哈萨克斯坦为缔约方（由国家环境主管机构执行）。对于R-600a器具，制造商须：（1）核实制冷剂充注量符合GOST IEC 60335-2-24的可燃制冷剂规定（每种隔间配置的R-600a最大充注量、通风及点火源要求）；（2）在产品文件、铭牌及俄语使用说明中声明制冷剂名称（R-600a／异丁烷）及充注量（克）；（3）若任何型号仍使用HFC（如R-134a，GWP 1430），须确认其进口／投放符合哈萨克斯坦的蒙特利尔议定书义务及现行的任何EAEU限制。R-600a家用器具的日常维修不触发特殊制冷剂处理资质，因为充注量远低于任何吨二氧化碳当量门槛。
summary.zht: 在哈薩克銷售的家用電冰箱已大量轉向使用R-600a（異丁烷，全球暖化潛能值約3），一種低GWP的碳氫化合物製冷劑。EAEU沒有單一的、與歐盟氟氣體法規直接對應的氟氣體削減法規；相反，可燃製冷劑安全在器具層面通過安全法規TR CU 004/2011及協調標準GOST IEC 60335-2-24執行，而更廣泛的HFC削減則依據《蒙特利爾議定書基加利修正案》管理，哈薩克為締約方（由國家環境主管機構執行）。對於R-600a器具，製造商須：（1）核實製冷劑充注量符合GOST IEC 60335-2-24的可燃製冷劑規定（每種隔間配置的R-600a最大充注量、通風及點火源要求）；（2）在產品文件、銘牌及俄語使用說明中聲明製冷劑名稱（R-600a／異丁烷）及充注量（克）；（3）若任何型號仍使用HFC（如R-134a，GWP 1430），須確認其進口／投放符合哈薩克的蒙特利爾議定書義務及現行的任何EAEU限制。R-600a家用器具的日常維修不觸發特殊製冷劑處理資質，因為充注量遠低於任何噸二氧化碳當量門檻。

standards_or_laws: TR CU 004/2011 — Technical Regulation of the Customs Union On the safety of low-voltage equipment (appliance-level flammable refrigerant safety via harmonised standard)
GOST IEC 60335-2-24 — flammable refrigerant (R-600a) charge limits, ventilation and ignition-source requirements (harmonised under TR CU 004/2011)
Kigali Amendment to the Montreal Protocol — HFC phase-down; Kazakhstan is a party (administered by national environmental authorities)
ISO 817 — Refrigerants — Designation and safety classification (R-600a classified A3: lower flammability)

summary.en: China regulates flammable refrigerant safety at appliance level through GB 4706.13-2014, which incorporates R-600a flammability provisions derived from IEC 60335-2-24, and through GB 9237 （safety requirements for refrigerating systems, aligned with ISO 5149）. China operates its HFC phase-down under the Kigali Amendment to the Montreal Protocol （ratified June 2021）, administered by the Ministry of Ecology and Environment （MEE）, with its own national schedule. Chinese appliance manufacturers exporting R-600a units to Kazakhstan are generally well-positioned for the refrigerant aspect because both the Chinese GB 4706.13 and the EAEU GOST IEC 60335-2-24 share the same IEC 60335-2-24 flammable-refrigerant base, but charge amounts and documentation must still be verified against the EAEU requirements.
summary.zh: 中国在器具层面通过GB 4706.13-2014管理可燃制冷剂安全，该标准纳入源自IEC 60335-2-24的R-600a可燃性规定，并通过GB 9237（制冷系统安全要求，参照ISO 5149）管理。中国依据《蒙特利尔议定书基加利修正案》（2021年6月批准加入）执行HFC削减，由生态环境部（MEE）管理，并有自己的国家时间表。向哈萨克斯坦出口R-600a器具的中国制造商在制冷剂方面一般具备良好条件，因为中国GB 4706.13和EAEU GOST IEC 60335-2-24均共享同一IEC 60335-2-24可燃制冷剂基础，但仍须针对EAEU要求核实充注量及文件。
summary.zht: 中國在器具層面通過GB 4706.13-2014管理可燃製冷劑安全，該標準納入源自IEC 60335-2-24的R-600a可燃性規定，並通過GB 9237（製冷系統安全要求，參照ISO 5149）管理。中國依據《蒙特利爾議定書基加利修正案》（2021年6月批准加入）執行HFC削減，由生態環境部（MEE）管理，並有自己的國家時間表。向哈薩克出口R-600a器具的中國製造商在製冷劑方面一般具備良好條件，因為中國GB 4706.13和EAEU GOST IEC 60335-2-24均共享同一IEC 60335-2-24可燃製冷劑基礎，但仍須針對EAEU要求核實充注量及文件。

standards_or_laws: GB 4706.13-2014 — flammable refrigerant (R-600a) requirements in household refrigerating appliances (derived from IEC 60335-2-24)
GB 9237 — Safety requirements for refrigerating systems and heat pumps (aligned with ISO 5149)
Kigali Amendment to the Montreal Protocol — China HFC phase-down schedule (ratified June 2021, administered by MEE)

gap.en: For R-600a appliances the gap is documentation and charge verification rather than a fundamental technology gap, and is small because both regimes trace to IEC 60335-2-24: (1) EAEU product documentation, rating plate, and user instructions must state the refrigerant designation （R-600a / isobutane）, charge weight in grams, and flammable-refrigerant safety precautions, in Russian （and Kazakh where required）; (2) the R-600a charge must be verified against the GOST IEC 60335-2-24 maximum limits for the room volume and appliance configuration; Chinese CCC test data may not explicitly confirm EAEU charge-limit compliance if tested under slightly different configurations; (3) if any model in the export range uses R-134a or another HFC, confirm consistency with Kazakhstan's Montreal Protocol / Kigali obligations and any EAEU import restrictions in force before placement. [NOTE: the precise national HFC quota / restriction status for refrigeration in Kazakhstan should be confirmed with the national environmental authority before regulatory submissions.]
gap.zh: 对于R-600a器具，差距在于文件和充注量核实，而非根本性技术差距，且因两套制度均溯源于IEC 60335-2-24而较小：（1）EAEU产品文件、铭牌及使用说明须以俄语（必要时含哈萨克语）说明制冷剂名称（R-600a／异丁烷）、充注量（克）及可燃制冷剂安全注意事项；（2）须针对GOST IEC 60335-2-24关于房间容积和器具配置的最大限值核实R-600a充注量；若中国CCC检测在略有不同的配置下进行，可能未明确确认符合EAEU充注量限值；（3）若出口系列中任何型号使用R-134a或其他HFC，须在投放前确认其符合哈萨克斯坦的蒙特利尔议定书／基加利义务及现行的任何EAEU进口限制。【注：应在监管提交前向国家环境主管机构确认哈萨克斯坦制冷领域的具体国家HFC配额／限制状态。】
gap.zht: 對於R-600a器具，差距在於文件和充注量核實，而非根本性技術差距，且因兩套制度均溯源於IEC 60335-2-24而較小：（1）EAEU產品文件、銘牌及使用說明須以俄語（必要時含哈薩克語）說明製冷劑名稱（R-600a／異丁烷）、充注量（克）及可燃製冷劑安全注意事項；（2）須針對GOST IEC 60335-2-24關於房間容積和器具配置的最大限值核實R-600a充注量；若中國CCC檢測在略有不同的配置下進行，可能未明確確認符合EAEU充注量限值；（3）若出口系列中任何型號使用R-134a或其他HFC，須在投放前確認其符合哈薩克的蒙特利爾議定書／基加利義務及現行的任何EAEU進口限制。【註：應在監管提交前向國家環境主管機構確認哈薩克製冷領域的具體國家HFC配額／限制狀態。】

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory at appliance level — flammable refrigerant charge limits under GOST IEC 60335-2-24 (harmonised under TR CU 004/2011) apply; HFC phase-down obligations arise under the Kigali Amendment to the Montreal Protocol for Kazakhstan
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory at appliance level via GB 4706.13-2014 (R-600a charge limits); China HFC phase-down under Kigali Amendment administered by MEE

source.publisher: Eurasian Economic Commission (EAEU) — TR CU 004/2011 / Montreal Protocol (Kigali Amendment)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] R-600a is the dominant refrigerant in Kazakhstan-market household refrigerators and faces no direct EAEU phase-down prohibition; safety is enforced at appliance level via GOST IEC 60335-2-24 under TR CU 004/2011. Manufacturers must verify the R-600a charge against the GOST IEC 60335-2-24 limits and document the refrigerant type and charge weight in Russian. Any HFC-based models should be checked against Kazakhstan's Montreal Protocol / Kigali obligations before market entry.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] R-600a是哈萨克斯坦市场家用电冰箱的主流制冷剂，不受EAEU直接削减禁令约束；安全在器具层面通过TR CU 004/2011项下的GOST IEC 60335-2-24执行。制造商须针对GOST IEC 60335-2-24限值核实R-600a充注量，并以俄语记录制冷剂类型及充注量。任何含HFC的型号在进入市场前须对照哈萨克斯坦的蒙特利尔议定书／基加利义务进行核查。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] R-600a是哈薩克市場家用電冰箱的主流製冷劑，不受EAEU直接削減禁令約束；安全在器具層面通過TR CU 004/2011項下的GOST IEC 60335-2-24執行。製造商須針對GOST IEC 60335-2-24限值核實R-600a充注量，並以俄語記錄製冷劑類型及充注量。任何含HFC的型號在進入市場前須對照哈薩克的蒙特利爾議定書／基加利義務進行核查。
